identity.title: The Wreck of the Meridian
identity.tagline: A castaway on a hostile shore. Loot the wreck before the sea takes it, then find a way to leave.
identity.archetype: Robinson Crusoe survival thriller (public domain, 1719) — also echoes CAST AWAY (2000)

constraints: Ecology is self-consistent with an equatorial castaway island: reef, palms, mangroves, feral goats, seabirds, jungle cats, parrots, sharks. No cold/temperate or volcanic life.
SIGNAL vs CONCEAL: a signal (fire/pyre/light) raises rescue chance AND predator/wildlife attention; brighter signal = more of both. Staying dark and quiet is safe but unseen.
Wildlife is the antagonist: sharks in the water, night predators on land, storms at sea. The jungle cat and parrot can be tamed and turned to the player's use.
THE WRECK'S CLOCK: wreck integrity falls every turn (tide and weather). At 0 the wreck breaks up and its un-salvaged items are lost forever.
NIGHT falls on a cycle; warmth falls each night and is restored by fire or shelter. At warmth 0, life falls.
Each meaningful action advances the tide/clock one tick.
A locked connection or container requires its key item in inventory before it opens.
The player cannot leave the open ocean until a craft (raft or balloon) is built and launched, or until a rescue is triggered by signal.
Man Friday is omitted; the companion is a tamed jungle cat (hunting/scouting) and/or a tamed parrot (warning/messenger).

lore_seed.subject: the Meridian
lore_seed.object: a merchant brig wrecked on a reef off an uninhabited equatorial island

lore_seed.subject: the player
lore_seed.object: the sole survivor of the Meridian, washed ashore with nothing

lore_seed.subject: the island
lore_seed.object: a forested equatorial island with a reef, a jungle, a freshwater spring, and a high cliff

lore_seed.subject: the wreck
lore_seed.object: an integrity that falls each turn; at 0 it is gone and its cargo lost

lore_seed.subject: a signal
lore_seed.object: both rescue (ships/planes) and predators (sharks, night hunters)

lore_seed.subject: night
lore_seed.object: warmth; fire or shelter restores it; at 0 warmth, life falls

lore_seed.subject: a jungle cat
lore_seed.object: a wild predator that can be tamed with food; once tamed it hunts and scouts

lore_seed.subject: a parrot
lore_seed.object: a wild bird that can be tamed; once tamed it warns of ships and predators

lore_seed.subject: escape
lore_seed.object: by raft, by hot-air balloon, by signal rescue, or by enduring on the island

ecology._note: Equatorial castaway island. LLM derives specifics from here; keep consistent with constraints.

story.skeleton: Crusoe: restless departure -> wreck -> salvage -> mastery of the island -> companion -> multiple endings (rescue / self-sufficient / perish). CAST AWAY parallel: the wreck, the companion object, the raft, the signal fire.
story.omitted: Man Friday human plotline omitted per design; replaced by tamed wildlife companions.
beats: ORDINARY WORLD: you sailed against better judgment; the brig Meridian founders on the reef.
CALL/THRESHOLD: you wash ashore alone; the wreck groans on the reef, already breaking up.
TESTS (the Wreck's Clock): salvage tools, sailcloth, provisions, a rifle, a waterproof radio before the sea takes it.
ALLIES: tame the jungle cat (hunting) and the parrot (warning) instead of a human companion.
ORDEAL: the first night, the squall, the shark in the shallows, starvation pressure.
REWARD/MASTERY: a shelter, a signal pyre, a raft — you can now choose HOW to leave.
RETURN (endings): rescue by ship, sail the raft, ascend in a balloon, or make the island home.

story_gaps.why_the_meridian_sailed: TODO: cargo? exile? a foolish bet? (player backstory)
story_gaps.the_cat_name: TODO: player names the cat (LLM should ask/accept a name)
story_gaps.what_was_in_the_radio: TODO: a working frequency? a last message from another survivor?
story_gaps.the_island_history: TODO: was it ever inhabited? a wreck before yours? (easter-egg lore)

beach.name: Shingle Beach
beach.desc: Where the sea spat you out. The Meridian lies broken on the reef, a hundred yards out. The jungle waits inland.

wreck_shore.name: Wreck Shore
wreck_shore.desc: At low light you can wade toward the Meridian's hull. She is breaking up fast.

tide_pools.name: Tide Pools
tide_pools.desc: Rock pools thick with crabs and shellfish; a seep of fresh water filters down.

jungle.name: Jungle Interior
jungle.desc: Close, green, loud with birds. Feral goats browse; something with yellow eyes watches from the figs.

spring.name: Freshwater Spring
spring.desc: Cold sweet water wells from the rock. Life, here.

cliff.name: The Cliff
cliff.desc: A high bare promontory. From here you can see the whole reef — and be seen. A dead tree waits for a pyre.

cove.name: Sheltered Cove
cove.desc: Calm water between two headlands. The place to build and launch a craft.

camp.name: Your Camp
camp.desc: A lean-to of palms and sailcloth you raised. Safe at night if the fire holds.

wreck.name: The Meridian (wreck)
wreck.note: Each salvage action pulls one category and costs wreck integrity. Once integrity hits 0 the wreck is gone.

tools.name: tools
tools.desc: hatchet, knife, rope — the means to build.

provisions.name: provisions
provisions.desc: hardtack and a jar of rum; staves off starvation, briefly.

rifle.name: musket
rifle.desc: sodden but serviceable; a noise that scares predators, a tool to hunt.

radio.name: waterproof radio
radio.desc: a wireless set — if you can power and tune it, someone may answer.

bamboo.name: bamboo
bamboo.desc: strong, light; raft and frame material.

fresh_water.name: fresh water
fresh_water.desc: the difference between life and the sun.

cat.name: the jungle cat
cat.effect: once tamed: passive food (hunts), scouts and warns of land predators

parrot.name: the parrot
parrot.effect: once tamed: warns of approaching ships (rescue) and predators; can repeat observations

puzzles.rule: salvage pulls one cargo category; each turn wreck integrity falls; at 0 wreck lost
raft requires tools + sailcloth + bamboo at the cove
signal meter raised by feeding the pyre; raises rescue AND predator attention
cat tamed by giving goat_meat at the jungle
parrot tamed by giving fig at the cliff
radio + signal high may trigger ship rescue

endings.condition: signal >= 8 AND (has radio OR parrot warned of ship) AND clock not expired
endings.label: A SAIL ON THE HORIZON

endings.condition: survive to clock >= max AND life > 0 AND shelter built
endings.label: THE ISLAND IS HOME
